snippets.snippet: For what you pay you get amazing value!:)
All is good, the best hostel ever

address.address1: Jln.  H.  Agus Salim Pertokoan Simpang Tiga Ie Meulee & Sumur Tiga Samping Kantor Dishub Kel.  Ie Meulee Kec. Sukajaya

description.short: Conveniently situated in the Sabang part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options.

minAge: Minimum age of guests is: 18 year(s).
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

reviewSnippets: For what you pay you get amazing value!:)

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Perfect for everything, saya booking salah tanggalpun masih boleh menginap. Terbaik memang I am backpacker, dekat dari mana mana pula

reviewerInfo.roomTypeName: Bunk Bed in Male Dormitory Room

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Really only one complaint: The framed photo of Adolph Hitler hanging on the wall in the reception. I don’t know who’s responsible for that, and it may have nothing to do with the really helpful staff person I dealt with there, but I found it inexcusably offensive. There was also a bit of confusion initially because the sign out front is for a different hostel, not I am Backpacker, which appears to have been taken over by the other one or something.
comments.reviewPositives: Clean, good ac in room, big lockers, functional bathroom. Staff extremely helpful. Wifi good.
comments.reviewTitle: Very good facilities at a good price.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Not far from Sabang town, there is a restaurant down the road. The restroom is quite small and not very convenient for washing up, but the room is spacious and the mattress is comfortable. Most importantly, there is air conditioning. It is impossible to sleep on the island without air conditioning. So at this price, having air conditioning makes other inconvenient facilities irrelevant.

reviewerInfo.roomTypeName: Bunk Bed in Male Dormitory Room

comments.originalComment: 距离sabang镇不远，往下走一点欧吃饭的餐厅，洗手间比较小，洗漱不太方便，但是房间比较宽敞，床垫比较舒服，最重要的是有空调，在岛上没有空调无法入睡的，所以这个价格，有空调已经无需多言其她不便的设施

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Bed is comfortable, near the city with restaurants

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Relatively clean.  Toilet has no lock. Water pressure is minimum. No hot water. Price matches facilities..
comments.reviewTitle: Not hot shower/ toilet has no lock

reviewerInfo.roomTypeName: Bunk Bed in Male Dormitory Room

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives:
Very cheap with aircond, fast internet at the dorm, balcony with village and sea view. near sumur tiga beach can reach by walk and near to city centre (better rent scooter). Fast check-in processed and free for early check-in. Amazing place and staff. 
At downstair had coffeeshop and Ayam penyet food and noodles to eat for afternoon and evening. 

Easy check out, i just confirmation by chatt. I asked everything about sabang by whastapp and got lot of information about attractive place and local food in Sabang And the end the staff help me to booked becak (tuktuk) transportation to the port goback to banda aceh.

Perfect, Cheap, Instan services for Backpackers

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: For what you pay you get amazing value!:)

reviewerInfo.roomTypeName: Bunk Bed in Female Dormitory Room

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Hostel a little bit basic. Unfortunately I losted my shorts that I left on the string outside. 🫤
comments.reviewPositives: Very good value for that money.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: During the stay, do it yourself and keep the room clean, lie down with the air conditioning on, a very comfortable mattress, rent a motorcycle to solve transportation issues, which makes it easier to travel around.

reviewerInfo.roomTypeName: Bunk Bed in Male Dormitory Room

comments.originalComment: 入住期间，自己动手，把房间卫生做好，开着空调躺下，非常舒服的床垫，自己租一辆摩托车，解决交通问题，去周边更方便

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Great location in the gardens , on the sea side, spacious bungalow with hammock on the balcony
comments.reviewTitle: Great stay, clean and comfortable bungalow

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives:
Das Waschbecken total versifft, Toilette und Dusche dreckig .Seit Monaten nicht gereinigt. 
Das Personal scheint auch kein Interesse zu haben um zu reinigen. 
Nie wieder
comments.reviewPositives: Das Zimmer war groß, Bett war in Ordnung. Es gab ein großen Schrank zum Abschließen

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Sporco ed indecente, materasso e cuscino senza lenzuolo, non ci sono parole per descrivere lo stato della struttura. Ladri!
comments.reviewPositives: Terrificante, assolutamente non come dalle foto.
comments.reviewTitle: È stato davvero terrificante siamo scappate il giorno dopo

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Worth it and perfect. Aircond, comfy bed, balcony with village view between the sea. I think only one hostel with cheapest price like this place. Free Internet in all areas, very amazing. You must stay here guys the price very cheap

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: better rent scooter, easy and could explored entire place on the island.
comments.reviewPositives:
Clean room, very wide with aircond and perfect internet. Good services, Got lot of information also recommendation for tourist spot and culinary by whatsap chat. Don't hesitate to contact the admin number. 
Food and coffee at the downstair very cheap. Beatiful beach near the hostel. Will back next time
comments.reviewTitle: Cheapest with Aircond and fast Internet

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Unfortunately someone stolen my short shorts. I don't blame the owners for this, of course but if you will be there, be careful.
comments.reviewPositives: Big dorm with calm atmosphere, nice view from roof.
